title: Programming - Programming in C - Identify Function

questions.question:
Consider the following \( C \) code.

#include <stdio.h> 
#include <math.h> 
void main ()  
{  
      double pi = 3.1415926535;   
      int a = 1;  
      int i;    
      for (i=0; i < 3; i++) 
            if (a = cos(pi * i/2)) 
                  printf("% d", 1);  
            else printf("%d", 0); 
}

What would the program print?



Programming in C: ISRO
